mapper.sql: SELECT a.submit_id, a.selection_id, a.student_id, stu.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_no, s.topic_id, pt.topic_name, s.custom_topic_name, s.is_custom_topic, s.teacher_id, tea.real_name AS teacher_name, s.campus_name, s.academic_year, a.file_id, f.original_name AS file_name, f.file_size, f.mime_type, a.remark, DATE_FORMAT(a.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_time, DATE_FORMAT(a.update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS update_time FROM achievement_submit a LEFT JOIN project_selection s ON a.selection_id = s.selection_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user stu ON a.student_id = stu.user_id AND stu.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_topic pt ON s.topic_id = pt.topic_id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user tea ON s.teacher_id = tea.user_id AND tea.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN doc_file f ON a.file_id = f.file_id AND f.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a.is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
AND s.campus_name = ( SELECT u.campus_name FROM sys_user u WHERE u.user_id = #{req.teacherId} AND u.is_deleted = 0 )
AND s.academic_year LIKE CONCAT(#{req.academicYear}, '%')
AND (stu.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%') OR stu.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%') OR pt.topic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(a.submit_id) FROM achievement_submit a LEFT JOIN project_selection s ON a.selection_id = s.selection_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user stu ON a.student_id = stu.user_id AND stu.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_topic pt ON s.topic_id = pt.topic_id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND s.campus_name = ( SELECT u.campus_name FROM sys_user u WHERE u.user_id = #{req.teacherId} AND u.is_deleted = 0 )
AND s.academic_year LIKE CONCAT(#{req.academicYear}, '%')
AND (stu.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%') OR stu.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%') OR pt.topic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%'))
